subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath advanced toward the Ocean of Utterance, when the All-Merciful came from the heaven of exposition and called unto all creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی بحر البیان اذ اتی الرحمن من سماء التبیان و ینادی الامکان
